---
name: Provider request
about: Suggest a new search provider
title: "[PROVIDER] "
labels: provider
---

## Provider Name
What search backend would you like to add?

## API Documentation
Link to the provider's API docs.

## Authentication
How does authentication work? (API key, OAuth, token, etc.)

## Why This Provider
What research use cases does it enable?

## Are You Willing to Contribute?
Let us know if you'd like to implement it.
